title: EaGirls soar over Pumas
description: RUGBY NEWS - The South Western Districts...
bodyText:
Gallery

RUGBY NEWS - The South Western Districts women's rugby team, the EaGirls, made short work of the Pumas at D'Almeida Park, Mossel Bay, today, 3 August.


> They beat the Pumas, who hail from Mpumalanga, 67-5.


The match, which was played in fine, sunny conditions, with little wind, started at 13:00.

The EaGirls have been on an unbeaten, winning streak and this is the latest of several triumphs.


> PHOTO GALLERY: Eagirls soar over Pumas


Photo: Robert Crous

Photo: Robert Crous

Photo: Robert Crous

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
